search.query: sourcetype=Aruba:CPPM:MDM status=known |dedup macAddress |stats count by Ownership
sourcetype=Aruba:CPPM:MDM status=known Ownership=$ownership$ |dedup macAddress |stats count by Compromised
sourcetype=Aruba:CPPM:MDM status=known Ownership=$ownership$ |dedup macAddress |stats count by Encryption_Enabled
sourcetype=Aruba:CPPM:MDM status=known Ownership=$ownership$ |dedup macAddress |stats count by Model
sourcetype=Aruba:CPPM:MDM status=known Ownership=$ownership$ |dedup macAddress |stats count by Manufacturer
sourcetype=Aruba:CPPM:MDM status=known Ownership=$ownership$ |dedup macAddress |stats count by OS_Version
